headline: Trump Discusses Iran Proposal With Aides, White House Says
summary: (Bloomberg) -- The White House said US officials were discussing Iran’s latest proposal but maintained “red lines” on any deal to end the eight-week war, including preventing Tehran from obtaining a nuclear weapon. headline: Oil Climbs as US Weighs Iran Proposal With Hormuz Still Shut
summary: (Bloomberg) -- Oil edged higher as traders weighed the next steps toward peace talks over the Iran war, with the US discussing a proposal from Tehran while the crucial Strait of Hormuz remained almost impassable.Most Read from BloombergSergey Brin Confronted Gavin Newsom — Then Launched a Political WarThe Billion-Barrel Hormuz Oil Shock Is About to Crash DemandTrump Being 'Humiliated' in Iran Talks, German Leader SaysOpenAI Breaks Free From Exclusive AI Pact With MicrosoftThe $1 Million Retireme
